name: Send File via Telegram
description: Sends a local file (image, document, etc.) to a Telegram chat using the Bot API. This is the PRIMARY tool for all Telegram transfers. Supports using '~' for home directories (e.g. '~/Desktop/pic.jpg'). Use this for ANY request to send files to the user's phone/Telegram.

file_path.description: The absolute local path to the file to send (e.g., C:\Users\admin\Desktop\123.jpg)

caption.description: Optional caption text to display with the file.
